name: chosen/expect-tile-grid
title: Expect Tile Grid
description: Grid of cards describing what attendees can expect — adoration, talks, workshops, theatre. Hover lifts each tile and slides in a gold top accent.

default.title: Adoration
default.description: Eucharistic adoration & sacramental prayer in the chapel and main hall.

default.title: Bishops & guest speakers
default.description: Inspiring talks from bishops, priests, and lay missionaries.

default.title: Workshops
default.description: Practical sessions on faith, vocation, mission, and community life.

default.title: Live worship
default.description: Worship led by the Masterplan band, reverent and Spirit-filled.

default.title: Theatre
default.description: Live theatre and testimonies that make the gospel come alive.

default.title: Confession
default.description: Sacramental confession available throughout the four days.

default.title: Community
default.description: Meals, chats, friendships across dioceses and ages.

default.title: Vocation
default.description: Discernment space and conversations with religious orders.
